overview.description: The Xtrackers Short Duration High Yield Bond ETF (SHYL) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in high yield fixed income. The fund tracks an index of USD-denominated high-yield corporate bonds with 0 to 5 years remaining to maturity. SHYL was launched on Jan 10, 2018 and is issued by Xtrackers.
infoTable: Solactive USD High Yield Corporates Total Market 0-5 Year Index
